title: koeleria cristata subsp. seminuda
intro: Koeleria cristata subsp. seminuda, also known as small hair grass or slender hair grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Koeleria cristata subsp. seminuda can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions.
